campus.name: South Valley Campus
campus.description: AASTMT’s Upper Egypt campus serving the South Valley region with a focus on business education, community development, and regional economic growth.

college.name: College of Management & Technology – South Valley
college.parent_institution: Arab Academy for Science, Technology and Maritime Transport
college.positioning: Regional business college focused on high-quality undergraduate education, ethical standards, applied research, and serving the South Valley community.
college.vision: To be one of the most privileged business management colleges in Egypt and the Middle East, and to be recognized as a premier business college in higher education and applied research serving industry and society locally and globally.
college.mission: To provide high-quality business education and training using modern teaching methodologies and technologies, uphold strong ethical standards, support community development in South Valley, and prepare graduates to compete effectively in regional and global business environments.

programs.name: Finance
programs.focus: Financial management, banking, and corporate finance

programs.name: Accounting
programs.focus: Financial accounting, auditing, and managerial accounting

programs.name: Marketing
programs.focus: Marketing principles, consumer behavior, and market analysis

programs.name: Business Information Systems
programs.focus: Business systems, information management, and digital tools

research_focus: Sustainable development in the Arab region

best_for: Students in Upper Egypt seeking accredited business education
less_suitable_for: Students aiming for highly competitive multinational careers immediately after graduation

quality_assurance.note: Quality assurance practices follow AASTMT standards; formal unit not explicitly stated.
